scenarios.title: [FWJ-1] - Check that the landscape image loads with a valid src
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the loading-images demo page and wait for the #landscape image element to become visible, then verify its src attribute contains 'landscape' (case-insensitive).
expectedAssertions: After page navigation, the #landscape image element is visible in the DOM (waitForPageLoad passes)
The #landscape image src attribute value contains the substring 'landscape' (case-insensitive, toHaveAttribute with /landscape/i)

locatorTable.notes: Mechanical By.id -> CSS-id translation per mandatory hallucination-defense rule (analyze.md rule 1). No DOM snapshot; no alt-text or aria evidence available. Reviewer upgrade path (Q1): if confirmed alt attribute exists (e.g. alt='landscape'), Stage 2 should use page.getByAltText(/landscape/i) instead — raises selector quality from 0/1 to 1/1.
